name: XAUUSD_M5_AsiaLondonRangeBreakout
hypothesis: After a contained Asia session range (0.5-2.0x ATR) on XAUUSD M5, the first true breakout during the London window (07:00-10:00 UTC) with body >=1.2x ATR produces a directional expansion that persists for at least 1.5x ATR before mean-reverting.

entry.long: close > asia_range_high + 0.5*ATR(14) AND bar_body >= 1.2*ATR(14) AND bars_since_london_open <= 9
entry.short: close < asia_range_low - 0.5*ATR(14) AND bar_body >= 1.2*ATR(14) AND bars_since_london_open <= 9

exits.stop_loss: 0.75*ATR(14) from entry, placed on opposite side of broken level
exits.breakeven_trigger: 1.0*ATR(14) in favor -> move SL to entry
